prestazioni: Engine: Replace the stock LGZ 3.6L V6 (engine code LGZ) with a custom-built forced-induction setup using a Garrett GTX3582R turbocharger, paired with a PTP Turbo Manifold designed specifically for the LGZ engine. Upgrade the fuel system with Injector Dynamics ID1050x injectors, a Walbro 450 LPH in-tank fuel pump, and a Radium Engineering fuel pressure regulator to support 550+ whp on E85.

Drivetrain: Install a South Bend Clutch Stage 3 twin-disc clutch kit with a billet flywheel to handle increased torque, paired with a Getrag M90 6-speed manual transmission swap (from the Cadillac ATS-V) for improved gear ratios and durability. Add a Quaife ATB differential to the rear axle for better power distribution.

Suspension: Replace the stock suspension with a custom Öhlins Road & Track DFV coilover kit, specifically valved for the Canyon AT4’s chassis. Add Eibach Pro-Street Sway Bars (24mm front, 22mm rear) and polyurethane bushings from Energy Suspension to reduce body roll and improve handling precision.
estetica: Aero: Install a custom widebody kit from Liberty Walk’s LB Works division, designed exclusively for the Canyon AT4, featuring aggressive fender flares, a carbon fiber front splitter, and a rear diffuser. Add a custom carbon fiber hood with functional heat extractors from Seibon Carbon.

Lighting: Replace the stock headlights with a set of Morimoto XB LED projectors, integrated with a Diode Dynamics SS3 Max LED fog light upgrade. Add a custom LED light bar from Baja Designs (S8 50-inch) mounted in the bed for off-road visibility.

Wheels & Exterior: Fit a set of Rotiform LAS-R wheels (18x9 +12 front, 18x10 +18 rear) wrapped in Nitto Ridge Grappler tires (275/65R18 front, 295/65R18 rear). Add a custom matte military green wrap with satin black accents, and replace the stock grille with a mesh grille from T-Rex Grilles for improved airflow.
